name: repo-skills
description: Repo-local planning and PR workflow skills for this clone.

interface.shortDescription: Direct workflow skills for repo plans and PRs
interface.longDescription: Use the PR, PRs, Test, Assess Plan, Assess Design, Augment, and Add Repo Skill workflows directly from the plugin. No activation step or copied personal skills are required.
defaultPrompt: Use PR for the next plan item in the current repo.
Use PRs to run a sequential range of planned PRs with commit evidence after each one.
Use Test to validate the current repo changes with i && b && v, optionally passing a v selector.
Use Add Repo Skill to add a new repo-local skill that follows the plugin conventions.
Use Assess Plan to compare a spec or plan against the current implementation.
Use Augment to append new PR sections to the shared plan document.
